'''''Dreadnaught-Six''''', abbreviated to '''''D-Six''''', was the sixth of six [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]] utilized in the construction of ''[[Outbound Flight]]''.

==History==
The [[Warship/Legends|warship]] came directly from the [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] of [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] for use on the ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' project<ref name="Outbound Flight" /> in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> When the exploratory vessel crashed into the [[Redoubt]] and the [[Survivors (Outbound Flight)|Survivors]] formed a colony, the [[Quarantine section|Jedi Quarantine]] was established there.<ref name="Survivor's Quest">''[[Survivor's Quest]]''</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}
